$comment: Lighthouse CI config — source of truth for thresholds. The runner is scripts/lighthouse-ci.mjs (uses `lighthouse` + `chrome-launcher` from devDeps; no @lhci/cli needed). Mobile preset matches Google CWV scoring used in Search Console. Thresholds are tuned for the LOCAL `next start` environment — production scores are typically 10-20 points higher due to Vercel CDN + brotli + image optimization. To check production numbers against CWV 'Good' tier, run `node scripts/lighthouse-ci.mjs --url https://www.bijakbeli.web.id/`. Update threshold here when you intentionally raise the bar.
